prediction_function:
# R code for logistic regression predictions
# LP = linear predictor (computed automatically including intercept)

# Convert linear predictor to probabilities using logistic function
probabilities <- 1 / (1 + exp(-LP))

# Return as matrix for consistency
result_matrix <- matrix(probabilities, ncol = 1)
colnames(result_matrix) <- 'probability'
result_matrix

metadata.description: Sample AKI logistic regression model for testing IndepValidate
